modelOutput.name: Lazy Lasagna
modelOutput.instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Brown the meat in a large skillet over high heat, then drain off any excess fat if necessary. Add the sauce and seasonings, and simmer over low heat for several minutes.
3. If using frozen spinach, put the spinach in a colander and squeeze and push to get all the liquid out.
4. Put the cream cheese, cottage cheese, and eggs in a food processor and process until smooth.
5. Layer half the meat sauce in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking dish. Top with half the grated mozzarella, then layer on half the spinach. Follow with half the cheese mixture, then layer on half the spinach. Repeat the layers, ending with the mozzarella. Top with a good sprinkling of Parmesan cheese. Bake for 40 minutes or until bubbly.

ingredients.name: ground meat
ingredients.prepNote: thawed; beef and venison work well

ingredients.name: spaghetti sauce
ingredients.prepNote: 12-ounce jars; no-sugar-added pizza or spaghetti sauce (see Note)

ingredients.name: frozen chopped spinach
ingredients.prepNote: thawed; or use 8-16 ounces roughly chopped fresh spinach, depending on how much you prefer

ingredients.name: Parmesan cheese
ingredients.prepNote: finely grated; for sprinkling over top; green can kind is fine

corrections.reason: Model cannot read fractions smaller than 1/2. Card says '⅛ teaspoon cayenne pepper' — model defaulted to 0.5
Pattern: 'X (Y-ounce) package' — the parenthetical weight IS the quantity in OZ, not '1 package'
Should use OZ with the weight from parenthetical, not WHOLE for the package count
Pattern: '1 (14-ounce) container' — the parenthetical weight IS the quantity in OZ
Should use OZ with the weight from parenthetical, not WHOLE for the container count
Card says '¼ cup finely grated Parmesan cheese' — model read ¼ as ½

patternLessons: PARENTHETICAL_WEIGHT: When recipe says 'X (Y-ounce) package/container/can', extract as quantity=Y, unit=OZ. The parenthetical weight is the actual measurement.
SMALL_FRACTIONS: Must correctly read ⅛, ¼, ⅓ — do not default to 0.5 when fraction is unrecognized.
FRACTION_SYMBOLS: Unicode fraction characters (⅛ ¼ ⅓ ½ ⅔ ¾) map to: 0.125, 0.25, 0.333, 0.5, 0.667, 0.75
